reviews.标题: Nice Storage Container, But Where Are All the Legos?
reviews.评论: I do like this kit…and all the great instructions for all the neat designs…But, I do not like how few Legos you get. I love the big container, and you would think the Legos would fill it up to nearly the top. But that is not the case here. The included Legos fill the container up to around 1/3 (and I am still being generous in that estimation). So, what you are ACTUALLY buying is a cool storage container that fits together with other Lego storage containers with a sampling of different colored Legos (with some simple build instructions). I was hoping to buy a LOT of Legos with a nice storage container to go along with it.
This is a great box to have, but we didn’t realize it at first but our box was missing a bag of Lego’s as we were trying to build some of the Ideas it comes with.

It was a great deal and great product but regardless of what the pictures show there’s only a brick or two it seems of each color so if you’re trying to make any type of little building or anything at all, it just looks like a collection of 1 million different rainbow color bricks it’s just hard to Like imagine an object and make an object that looks more real. Everything ends up, looking like a patchwork of 100 random colors.

There are NOT anywhere near 790 peices in here they ripped me off and Iam not happy about it. This was a gift for my daughters birthday and she was so excited when she unwrapped it but that excitement quickly went away as there wasn‘t much in there at all.
Not all the pieces were included to make the items in book 1. The first thing we picked to build was missing several bricks. It was disappointing.

reviews.标题: Not the Lego you are looking for!
reviews.评论: Not sure what happened or what changed but the Lego sets I got are not what they used to be.
